title: account-transactions model tracks financial transaction records
content:
# account-transactions model tracks financial transaction records

`powerhouse/account-transactions` (10 ops) records individual financial transactions. Part of the Finance & Billing domain alongside [[accounts model defines the chart of accounts structure]], [[billing-statement model captures periodic billing summaries]], and [[payment-terms model defines payment conditions and schedules]].

## Position in Ecosystem

Sits in the Finance & Billing zone. Likely referenced by billing statements and invoices when itemizing charges.

## Cross-Model References

- Transactions reference accounts from the Accounts model
- BillingStatement and Invoice models may aggregate transactions

Since [[five models form a hierarchy from facet through template to offering to subscription to instance]], account-transactions operates downstream — recording the financial outcomes of subscription activity.

---

description: 10 operations — records individual financial transactions (debits, credits) against accounts for audit trails and reconciliation
